title: Scaling Pills
description: Add Scaling Pills to your world, that allow you to make yourself smaller or bigger.
body:
# Features

### Fundamental Features
- Adds 4 Shrinking Pills (2x-16x)
- Adds 4 Growing Pills (0.5x-0.0625x)
- Adds a neutral Pill that resets your size
- Huge Customization
- Custom Crafting

### Supported Versions
| Version             | Status               |
|:---------------------:|:---------------------:|
| 1.21.1  | ✅ Supported             |
| 1.21  | ✅ Supported              |
| 1.20.5  | ✅ Supported              |
| 1.20.4 or lower | ❌ Broken due to Minecraft limitations |

### Secondary Features
- Does not only change the Scale of Feature, but depending on the Settings also the Speed, Gravity, Jump Strength and so on.
- Resets your size back to normal on death.
- Programmed to be as Performance friendly as possible.

### Features coming soon
- Ability to scale other Entities
- Changing range

# Crafting

### Neutral Pill
This is the Crafting Recipe for the neutral Pill, wich resets you back to the normal size.
![Neutral Pill](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1b28f9edf15ae0bcd4171780a3082042516d2a4b.png)

### Shrink Pill
To Craft a Shrinking Pill, **drop** either the neutral Pill or a Shrinking Pill with 8 redstone **onto a crafting table**. This will give you the next bigger Pill.
![Shrink Pill](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b487253c8749b333e8e3cb8494f9911867f6a5b2.png)

### Grow Pill
To Craft a Growing Pill, **drop** either the neutral Pill or a Growing Pill with 8 glowstone **onto a crafting table**.
![Grow Pill](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/44a5f49a5229f67d28e47d3418e1bd01cc9fba4c.png)


# Customization

The Pack allows you to toggle what values should be changed, when shrinking or growing. To acces the Options Page just enter **/function sap:options** in chat. This will give you the next smaller Pill.
![customization](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/87aaffb6da8e0a2ae8315c8fe8c96608783077e9.png)

# Installation of Datapack

### Singleplayer - New World

1. Create a new world and click on "Data Packs".
2. Drag the data pack into the Minecraft window.
3. Click "Yes" on the confirmation screen.
4. Move the data pack to the right hand side of the screen by clicking the triangle on its icon.
5. Click "Done" and continue creating your world.


### Singleplayer - Existing World
1. Open Minecraft.
2. Select the world you want to install the data pack for, click on "Edit", then "Open world folder".
3. Open the folder named datapacks, and put the data pack into it. It should be a .zip file or directory.
4. Rejoin your world.


### Multiplayer

1. Download the data pack.
2. Open your server folder, then open the folder of the world you wish to install the data pack in (default: world).
3. Put the data pack into a folder named datapacks.
4. Type **/reload** from the console if the server was running during the installation.

#  
Made with ❤️
